variables.input:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.provider.name)
| summarize by:{gen_ai.provider.name}
| fields gen_ai.provider.name

fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model)
| summarize by:{gen_ai.request.model}
| fields gen_ai.request.model

0.content:
# 🤖 Developers AI Usage

Consumo de IA generativa pelos desenvolvedores — custo, performance e adoção, por modelo/família. Use os filtros **Provider** e **Modelo** no topo (ex.: Provider = `github` para uso real de Copilot; `gcp.vertex_ai` é dado de demonstração). Fonte: spans OTel GenAI (`gen_ai.*`).

11.title: Custo estimado (USD)
11.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| fieldsAdd inp=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd=if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus"),(inp*0.000015)+(out*0.000075),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet"),(inp*0.000003)+(out*0.000015),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku"),(inp*0.0000008)+(out*0.000004),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"mini"),(inp*0.00000015)+(out*0.0000006),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gpt-4o"),(inp*0.0000025)+(out*0.00001),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gemini"),(inp*0.00000125)+(out*0.000005),else:(inp*0.000002)+(out*0.00001)))))))
| summarize total=sum(cost_usd)

12.title: Requests
12.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| summarize requests=count()

13.title: Sessões
13.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.conversation.id)
| summarize sessions=countDistinct(gen_ai.conversation.id)

14.title: Devs ativos
14.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize devs=countDistinct(user.email)

15.title: Modelos
15.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| summarize modelos=countDistinct(gen_ai.request.model)

21.title: Custo por modelo (USD)
21.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| fieldsAdd inp=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd=if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus"),(inp*0.000015)+(out*0.000075),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet"),(inp*0.000003)+(out*0.000015),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku"),(inp*0.0000008)+(out*0.000004),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"mini"),(inp*0.00000015)+(out*0.0000006),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gpt-4o"),(inp*0.0000025)+(out*0.00001),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gemini"),(inp*0.00000125)+(out*0.000005),else:(inp*0.000002)+(out*0.00001)))))))
| summarize cost=sum(cost_usd), by:{gen_ai.request.model}
| sort cost desc

22.title: Custo por time (USD)
22.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(user.team)
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| fieldsAdd inp=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd=if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus"),(inp*0.000015)+(out*0.000075),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet"),(inp*0.000003)+(out*0.000015),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku"),(inp*0.0000008)+(out*0.000004),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"mini"),(inp*0.00000015)+(out*0.0000006),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gpt-4o"),(inp*0.0000025)+(out*0.00001),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gemini"),(inp*0.00000125)+(out*0.000005),else:(inp*0.000002)+(out*0.00001)))))))
| summarize cost=sum(cost_usd), by:{user.team}
| sort cost desc

23.title: Tokens ao longo do tempo por modelo
23.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| makeTimeseries tokens=sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)+toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)), by:{gen_ai.request.model}

24.title: Top devs por custo (USD)
24.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| fieldsAdd inp=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd=if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus"),(inp*0.000015)+(out*0.000075),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet"),(inp*0.000003)+(out*0.000015),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku"),(inp*0.0000008)+(out*0.000004),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"mini"),(inp*0.00000015)+(out*0.0000006),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gpt-4o"),(inp*0.0000025)+(out*0.00001),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gemini"),(inp*0.00000125)+(out*0.000005),else:(inp*0.000002)+(out*0.00001)))))))
| summarize cost=sum(cost_usd), tokens=sum(toLong(inp+out)), requests=count(), by:{user.email, user.team}
| sort cost desc
| limit 20

31.title: Latência por modelo (p50/p95)
31.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| summarize p50=percentile(duration,50), p95=percentile(duration,95), requests=count(), by:{gen_ai.request.model}
| sort p95 desc

32.title: Tempo de resposta ao longo do tempo (p90)
32.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| makeTimeseries p90=percentile(duration,90), by:{gen_ai.request.model}

41.title: Uso por família de modelo
41.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| fieldsAdd familia=if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"claude") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku"),"Claude",else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gpt"),"GPT",else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gemini"),"Gemini",else:"Outros")))
| summarize requests=count(), by:{familia}
| sort requests desc

42.title: Uso por time
42.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(user.team)
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| summarize requests=count(), by:{user.team}
| sort requests desc

43.title: Top devs por consumo
43.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"embedding")) and not(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"metis"))
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize requests=count(), tokens=sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)+toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)), sessions=countDistinct(gen_ai.conversation.id), by:{user.email, user.team}
| sort requests desc
| limit 10

Claude_cost.title: Custo (USD)
Claude_cost.query:
fetch spans
| filter contains(gen_ai.request.model,"claude") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku")
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, $Modelo)
| fieldsAdd inp=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out=toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd=if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus"),(inp*0.000015)+(out*0.000075),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet"),(inp*0.000003)+(out*0.000015),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku"),(inp*0.0000008)+(out*0.000004),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"mini"),(inp*0.00000015)+(out*0.0000006),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gpt-4o"),(inp*0.0000025)+(out*0.00001),else:if(contains(gen_ai.request.model,"gemini"),(inp*0.00000125)+(out*0.000005),else:(inp*0.000002)+(out*0.00001)))))))
| summarize total=sum(cost_usd)

Claude_tok.title: Tokens
Claude_tok.query:

| filter contains(gen_ai.request.model,"claude") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku")

Claude_lat.title: Tempo médio resp.
Claude_lat.query:
fetch spans
| filter contains(gen_ai.request.model,"claude") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"opus") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"sonnet") or contains(gen_ai.request.model,"haiku")

| filter gen_ai.provider.name=="github"
| filter in(gen_ai.provider.name, $Provider)
